summary: Executed backend pytest regression plus live-preview Playwright E2E for home/pricing/auth/dashboard/settings flows. Core launch flows pass in UI, but backend billing status endpoint fails and dashboard realtime websocket is misconfigured.

critical.issue: Returns 500 Internal Server Error for newly created valid Stripe checkout session IDs.

minor.issue: Returns 404 from live preview (health route mismatch vs expected /api namespace in external proxy).

integration_issues.issue: Client attempts websocket to ws://localhost:8000/ws causing ERR_CONNECTION_REFUSED in live preview.
UI can launch Stripe checkout, but payment status polling depends on failing /api/v1/billing/status endpoint (500).

action_items: Fix backend exception handling/Stripe status retrieval in GET /api/v1/billing/status/{session_id} so valid sessions return 200 with structured JSON.
Set websocket URL for production/preview (do not fallback to localhost); derive from current origin or env-provided public WS endpoint.
Align health endpoint exposure under /api or adjust tests/docs to the canonical external health route.
Add missing required credentials artifact: /app/memory/test_credentials.md (currently absent).
critical_code_review_comments: Hardcoded websocket fallback 'ws://localhost:8000/ws' in /app/frontend/hooks/use-watcher-websocket.ts breaks realtime in deployed environments.
API base URL env contract mismatch risk: frontend client uses NEXT_PUBLIC_API_URL while testing guidelines expect REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL; unify and document one source.
Auth form submit buttons use data-testid prop directly, but shared Button component only maps testId prop; resulting missing test IDs reduce UI testability compliance.
test_credentials: Required file /app/memory/test_credentials.md is missing. Used credentials supplied in review request.
seed_data_creation: Created throwaway account launchtester+ui<timestamp>@example.com via live preview registration.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend pytest: 3 passed, 2 failed. UI Playwright launch flows pass end-to-end (home->pricing/auth->dashboard->settings->stripe redirect). Realtime WS remains broken due to localhost URL fallback. Re-test billing status API and pricing status banner after backend fix.
rca of the issue: RCA-1: /api/v1/billing/status/{session_id} returns 500 for a session generated moments earlier, indicating unhandled exception in Stripe status retrieval/serialization path. Repro: create checkout via POST /api/v1/billing/checkout, then GET returned session_id status. Mitigation: wrap Stripe status call with robust error handling + fallback from stored transaction and return deterministic error JSON. RCA-2: Dashboard realtime failure due to hardcoded WS fallback to localhost in use-watcher-websocket.ts; preview users cannot connect. Mitigation: compute ws/wss URL from window.location host or env public WS URL and avoid localhost fallback in production builds.
